title: athyrium bulbiferum
intro: Athyrium bulbiferum, also known as the Autumn fern or Bulb-bearing Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium bulbiferum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Athyrium bulbiferum is traditionally prepared in herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
